name: PollOption
description: This object contains information about one answer option in a poll.

fields.name: persistent_id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the option, persistent on option addition and deletion

fields.name: text_entities
fields.description: Special entities that appear in the option text. Currently, only custom emoji entities are allowed in poll option texts

fields.name: media
fields.description: Media added to the poll option

fields.name: voter_count
fields.description: Number of users who voted for this option; may be 0 if unknown

fields.name: added_by_user
fields.description: User who added the option; omitted if the option wasn't added by a user after poll creation

fields.name: added_by_chat
fields.description: Chat that added the option; omitted if the option wasn't added by a chat after poll creation

fields.name: addition_date
fields.description: Point in time (Unix timestamp) when the option was added; omitted if the option existed in the original poll
